name: Pastry for Double-Crust Pie and Single-Crust Pie
recipeInstructions:
PASTRY FOR DOUBLE-CRUST PIE:
1. In a mixing bowl, stir together the flour and salt.
2. Using a pastry blender, cut in the shortening until pieces are about the size of small peas.
3. Sprinkle 1 tablespoon of the cold water over part of the mixture; gently toss with a fork.
4. Push to one side of the bowl.
5. Repeat steps 3-4, using 1 tablespoon of water at a time, until all is moistened.
6. Divide into two balls and form each half into a ball.
PASTRY FOR SINGLE-CRUST PIE:
Follow the directions for Pastry for Double-Crust Pie.
